---
name: Book idea
about: Suggest a book (or offer to write one)
title: "[idea] <working title or premise>"
labels: idea
---

**The premise**
In a sentence or two — what's the story, and whose is it?

**Whose story (the main character)**
First person, real and flawed — who are we following, and what do they want?

**Form & genre (a guess is fine)**
Short story / novelette / novella / novel? Genre or tone?

**A universe?**
New realm, or does it fit an existing one? (Fine to leave open.)

**Are you up for writing it?**
- [ ] I'd like to write it (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Just an idea — someone else is welcome to take it
